items.title_en: U.S. confirms second Texas screwworm case, Canada restricts livestock imports

items.title_en: Social media bans on teens risk strengthening Big Tech's grip on the sector, Bluesky exec warns
items.title_zh: Bluesky 高管警告称，针对青少年的社交媒体禁令可能会加强大型科技公司对该行业的控制
items.desc_en: "We're living in a world where it's almost impossible for smaller entrants to come in and build healthier spaces," Bluesky's COO, Rose Wang, told CNBC.

items.title_zh: 加拿大因美国爆发食肉螺旋虫而禁止饲养德克萨斯州牛

items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
items.title_zh: 普京表示，就结束乌克兰战争问题与泽伦斯基会面“毫无意义”
items.desc_en: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯总统拒绝之前，乌克兰总统写了一封公开信，呼吁进行面对面会谈。

items.title_en: Nasdaq drops 3% as selling in chip stocks picks up; S&P 500 9-week winning streak set to end: Live updates
items.title_zh: 由于芯片股抛售增加，纳斯达克指数下跌 3%；标准普尔 500 指数连续 9 周上涨即将结束：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 is on track to finish the week slightly higher, which would mark its 10th straight week of gains and its longest win streak since 1985.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数本周有望小幅上涨，这将标志着其连续第十周上涨，也是自 1985 年以来最长的连续上涨。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast as Putin prepares for key speech
items.title_zh: 普京准备发表重要讲话时，乌克兰袭击了货船并承认罗马尼亚无人机爆炸
items.desc_en: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰表示，它在亚速海和俄罗斯占领领土的沿海水域袭击了五艘载有非法货物的船只。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.title_en: QWERTYS
items.title_zh: QWERTYS
items.desc_en: My keyboard fell apart. Now it's your problem.
items.desc_zh: 我的键盘坏了。现在是你的问题了。

items.title_en: Warren Buffett disciple Guy Spier built career on value investing. A rare cancer changed everything
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特的弟子盖伊·斯皮尔 (Guy Spier) 的职业生涯建立在价值投资之上。一种罕见的癌症改变了一切
items.desc_en: After a glioblastoma diagnosis, value investor Guy Spier rethought wealth, time and legacy — and the impact he can have on rare disease research.
items.desc_zh: 在诊断出胶质母细胞瘤后，价值投资者盖伊·斯皮尔重新思考了财富、时间和遗产，以及他对罕见疾病研究的影响。

items.title_en: From Bitcoin to blockchain: Key cryptocurrency terms and what they mean
items.title_zh: 从比特币到区块链：关键的加密货币术语及其含义
items.desc_en: As the price of Bitcoin sinks once more, here's a guide to some of the trickiest crypto terms.
items.desc_zh: 随着比特币价格再次下跌，这里有一些最棘手的加密货币术语的指南。

items.title_en: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
items.title_zh: 撒哈拉沙漠卡车抛锚近50人渴死
items.desc_en: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.
items.desc_zh: 在长途跋涉 50 多公里（30 英里）穿越沙漠向当局报警后，只有两人幸存。

items.title_en: The ancient trick making food waste useful and tasty
items.title_zh: 让食物垃圾变得有用又美味的古老技巧
items.desc_en: Instead of throwing away byproducts of food processing, fermentation is making them valuable.
items.desc_zh: 发酵并没有丢弃食品加工的副产品，而是使它们变得有价值。

items.title_en: Mark Zuckerberg's longest-serving employee on AI, jobs - and her boss
items.title_zh: 马克·扎克伯格在人工智能、就业领域任职时间最长的员工——以及她的老板
items.desc_en: Naomi Gleit has weathered many controversies at Meta, but remains in what she tells the BBC is her "dream job".
items.desc_zh: 娜奥米·格莱特 (Naomi Gleit) 在 Meta 经受住了许多争议，但仍然坚守在她告诉 BBC 的“梦想工作”岗位上。

items.title_en: AI needs a 'brake pedal', warns Anthropic co-founder
items.title_zh: Anthropic 联合创始人警告说，人工智能需要一个“刹车踏板”
items.desc_en: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.
items.desc_zh: 杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 告诉 BBC 新闻之夜，人工智能可以在没有人类输入的情况下实现发展。

items.title_en: Exams watchdog warns of rise in high-tech cheating
items.title_zh: 考试监管机构警告高科技作弊现象增多
items.desc_en: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.
items.desc_zh: Ofqual 负责人表示，监考人员正在接受培训，以检测智能眼镜和隐藏式耳机等设备。

items.title_en: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
items.title_zh: 研究称火车上的电话信号大多数时候都不够好
items.desc_en: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 发现主要电话网络在火车上信号不佳，火车公司也降低了 Wi-Fi 速度。

items.title_en: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage
items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行、哈利法克斯银行和苏格兰银行应用程序用户报告服务中断
items.desc_en: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。

items.title_en: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
items.title_zh: 英国的出版商可以选择退出 Google AI 搜索结果
items.desc_en: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".
items.desc_zh: 竞争与市场管理局表示，这将使出版商“在与谷歌谈判内容交易时处于更有利的地位”。

items.title_en: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
items.title_zh: 您是否发现自己漫无目的地滚动？你并不孤单
items.desc_en: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.
items.desc_zh: Virgin Media O2 的一份报告显示，平均 36% 的人花在手机上的时间没有明确的目的。
